name: cold-turkey-blocker
title: Cold Turkey Blocker
description: Manage Cold Turkey Blocker blocks, locks, websites, device blocks, and breaks from Raycast.
author: nabecite

commands.name: manage-blocks
commands.title: Manage Blocks
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: List typed blocks and verify start, stop, toggle, lock, edit, or break actions.

commands.name: start-block
commands.title: Start Block
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Start a block unlocked, as configured, or with a timed, password, or random-text lock.

commands.name: add-entry
commands.title: Add Website or Exception
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Add one or more website patterns or exceptions to an existing block.

commands.name: create-block
commands.title: Create Block
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Create a website and app block or a device block.

commands.name: control-break
commands.title: Control Break
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Start or stop delay and random-text breaks.

commands.name: cli-diagnostics
commands.title: CLI Diagnostics
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Run safe, read-only CLI help, block-list, and sequential status diagnostics.

preferences.name: executablePath
preferences.title: Cold Turkey Executable
preferences.description: Absolute path to the Cold Turkey Blocker CLI executable.

preferences.name: commandTimeoutMs
preferences.title: CLI Timeout
preferences.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a CLI command.

preferences.name: confirmLockingActions
preferences.title: Safety
preferences.label: Confirm before commands that may lock or immediately activate a device block
preferences.description: Ask for confirmation before commands that may lock a block or immediately activate a device block.
